snippet.title: MADHANYA - Rahul Vaidya & Disha Parmar | Asees Kaur |Lijo-DJ Chetas| Anshul Garg | Wedding Song 2021
snippet.description:
Anshul Garg presents Madhanya by Rahul Vaidya & Asees Kaur featuring Rahul Vaidya & Disha Parmar. 


Singer: Rahul Vaidya & Asees Kaur
Music: Lijo George & Dj Chetas
Lyrics: Kumaar
Song Produced by Lijo George
Mixed and Mastered by Shadab Rayeen @ New Edge
Assistant engineer: Pukhraj
Vocals recorded at Soundideaz & Click Studios
Recording Engineers : Kittu & Rupak
Featuring: Rahul Vaidya & Disha Parmar

Producer - Anshul Garg

Video Director - Rajan Bir 
Video Supervisor - Raghav Sharma
Dop - Shinda Singh
Project Manager - Piyush Chandak
Co - Director - Anmol Randhawa 
Choreographer - Sahil Sharma 
Assistant Choreographer - Rajat 
Editor - Gaurav K Mehra 
Di - Onkar 
Styled by - Outro by Akshita & Anulika 
Jib operator - Manish Arora
Line producer  - RS films and production 
Makeup - Rajan Passi
Artwork - Vicky Sandhu
Distribution - Believe Digital
Promotions - Underdog Digital


Madhanya Lyrics : 

Beetein saare mausam
Babul tere ghar mein
Ab chale pav mere
Piya ke shehar mein (2)

Ho Tune Vidayiyan kaise
Likhi Marjaaniyan
Kaise bataye O Rabba
Sahi naiyon jaaniyan

Madhaniyan
Haaye o mere babula teriyan
Mithiyan yaadan
Mere peeche peeche auniyan haaye
Haaye o mere babula Meriya
Hun gudiyan
Kol tere reh jaaniyan haaye

Kuch bhi nahi hai tere
Kadmon se aage (2)
Tujhse jo baandhe maine
Tootenge na dhaage (2)

Haath mera thaama tune
Teri Meherbaaniyan
Mere naam ab se teri
Saari Pareshaniyan

Madhaniyan
Haaye ve mereya daadya rabba
Kinna jamiya kinna ne lai janiya haaye
Haaye ve mereya daadya rabba
Kinna jamiya kinna ne lai janiya haaye




#Madhanya #RahulVaidya #DishaParmar

snippet.title: Talja (Official Video) Jassa Dhillon | Deepak Dhillon | Gur Sidhu | New Punjabi Song 2021| Above All
snippet.description:
Brown Town Music Presents Official Video of Latest Punjabi Song of 2021 Talja By Jassa Dhillon Ft Deepak Dhillon From His Debut Album Above All.



Track Credits:
Track Name: Talja
Artist : Jassa Dhillon Ft Deepak Dhillon
Music : Gur Sidhu
Mixing & Mastering: B Saanj
Lyrics: Jassa Dhillon
Female Lead: Navi Brar
Edit & Colour Grading: Gobindpuriya
DOP: Renato Villas
Story/Screenplay: Garry Bhullar Films
Assitant Director: Paramvir
Make Up Artist: Parteek Dhillon
Bike Stunts: MSL Productions
BTS: Gundeep
Directed By: Japjeet Dhillon
Supporting Artists: Param Sandhu, Nirvair Sandhu & Lovely
Instagram Reels: Boss Music Productions
Special Thanks: Big Media
Hair Stylist: Varinder 8261
Lyrical Video:  Roop Kamal Singh
Producer: Nav Sandhu
Label: Brown Town Music
Team Believe: Shilpa Sharda & Srikant Seshadri





Online Promotions: BTown Media Entertainment
Instagram: https://instagram.com/btownmediaa​​​​​​



Do Share your feedback in comments.
Don't Forget to Subscribe Brown Town Music : http://bit.ly/subscribebrowntownmusic​​​




Talja Lyrics:

Oh baby bass rehando na lado,
mere husan de dushmna naal ,
Ehh jmaana jaalim ha,
te jaalim he rehna aa,
Oye aah kachjiya ambiya ta ma chabb k khaju , 
dekhi chall banda ki alet lene saare mai,
bicho paad du mere saale de,
 
 
Forda de toachan vargi yaari , 
ho peju pind  tere te bhari,
o vigdya jatt te jhota same
Kardu raga cho garmi saari ,
naal jo mere ohh bande agg , 
ptandar lott layinde ne thagg ,
roj da yabb  tu giriya chabb ho,
Dekh njaare ni ,
 
 
la sharta yara tera thoke te bade swaare ni , 
je kahe bna dya scene ma hune dabaare ni,
 
 
O talja o talja o talja talja talja
Talja talja ve badmasha, 
awe hoju koi tamasha ,
ve kato jaan dukhan vich pauni ,
Ve Koi la k rakh du passa ,
katt la rabb toh thoda dar k ,
thode ghot sabar de bharke,
sare pind di akh vich radke  , 
ve fadya jayega , 
awe velly banda banda ragya jayega ,
awe velly banda banda ragdya jayega,
 
Aah hukam de ike dukke  ni,
tere jatt de muhre fikke ni ,
on flasha hon kude,
rahinde saah vairi de khiche ni  ,
mast aa rahindi  chaal ,
lafdya nal kadiye laal ,
kai takkre  velly  mittra nu, 
sada vinga v na vaal , 
baba naal te khidya maal , 
te aun  hulaare ni ,
 
la sharta yaar tera thoke te bade swaare ni ,
j kahe bna dya scene ma hune dbaare ni,
 
Begaane putt hoye aa juttt , 
ve raat pawayega,
Aah patlo da dil kehnda,
tu att krayega ,
Shant shaant  k pauna,
ve jatta kurte kaale ,
chaklo chaklo kahinde,
jo pattu rakhda naale , 
tu ik te vairi bahle
Mud pachtayega ,
ve tu velly banda banda ragdya jayega
 
 
 
 
Pura tohra dhakad shora ,
ni zigre  bamb kude,
Aah rees jatt di laude,
ni jaane hamb kude
Tohna chakde roj he,
gode thale laa dya ge
Tu bol pyaar de bol  , 
hune puga dya ge
 
 
Toba toba , 
teriya galla ve,
toba toba tere karaar ,
na ishq tere vich bhora , 
ve sare auto e ne hathiyaar, 
din ne chaar te lammi car , 
sirre kuj laayega ,
jatta velly banda banda ragdya jayega ,
jatta velly banda banda ragdya jayega,
 
 
la sharta yaar tera thoke te bade sware ni.

snippet.title: 'അയ്യോ പൊലീസ്, ഓടിക്കോ...' വൈറലായ ആ ചേട്ടൻ ഇവിടെയുണ്ട്, പൊലീസ് പിടിച്ച ശേഷം എന്തു സംഭവിച്ചു? കാണാം
snippet.description:
Malayalam News Malayalam Latest News Malayalam Latest News Videos

Log onto MediaOne news live TV for the latest  Malayalam news update, Kerala breaking news, gulf news, trending Malayalam news, Malayalam  entertainment, sports news.
MediaOne is a 24x7 news channel which broadcasts the updated news from trustworthy sources. The fastest-growing channel with varied presentations makes the channel unique. So stay tuned with MediaOne for the latest updates that are happening around the world.
MediaOne is an initiative by Madhyamam.

കേരളത്തിലെ ഏറ്റവും മികച്ച വാര്‍ത്താ നെറ്റ്‌വര്‍ക്കാണ് മീഡിയവണ്‍ . ഏറ്റവും കൂടുതല്‍ പേര്‍ തത്സമയം മലയാളം വാര്‍ത്തകള്‍ കാണുന്ന മലയാളത്തിലെ മുന്‍നിര വാര്‍ത്താ ചാനല്‍. മൂല്യാധിഷ്ഠിതവും സ്വതന്ത്രവുമായ മാധ്യമപ്രവർത്തനം നടത്തുന്ന മലയാള ന്യൂസ് ടെലിവിഷൻ ചാനലാണിത്‌. ലോകമെമ്പാടുമുള്ള ഉറവിടങ്ങളിൽ നിന്ന്സമാഹരിച്ച കാലികവും സമഗ്രവുമായ  വാർത്തകളും പ്രോഗ്രാമുകളും വ്യത്യസ്തമായ രീതിയിൽ മീഡിയവൺ പ്രേക്ഷകരിലെത്തിക്കുന്നു. 

 24 മണിക്കൂറും ലോകത്തിന്‍റെ ഏത് ഭാഗത്ത് നിന്നും ഇവിടെ തത്സമയം #ലൈവ് കാണാം. അതിവേഗം വാര്‍ത്താ വീഡിയോകള്‍ ലഭിക്കാൻ മീഡിയവണ്‍ സബ്സ്ക്രൈബ് ചെയ്യൂ... ബെല്‍ ബട്ടണും ക്ലിക്ക് ചെയ്യൂ.

ഏറ്റവും പുതിയ  വാർത്തകൾക്കായി സന്ദർശിക്കുക: https://youtu.be/d1iwUB9YFnA
Watch the latest malayalam updates, Kerala news live and news around the world  with MediaOne News live TV
For more visit us: https://bit.ly/3iU2qNW

#MediaoneNews #MalayalamNews 

Genre: News
Language: Malayalam

snippet.title: Durga Chalisa Fast - Anuradha Paudwal | Durga Maa Songs | Durga Chalisa दुर्गा चालीसा | Bhakti Song
snippet.description:
Durga Chalisa Fast - Anuradha Paudwal | Durga Chalisa दुर्गा चालीसा | Durga Maa Songs | Durga Chalisa With Lyrics | Mata Ke Bhajan | Bhakti Song | Durga Bhajan

🔔 आप सभी भक्तों से अनुरोध है कि आप @Nova Spiritual India चैनल को सब्सक्राइब करें व भजनो का आनंद ले व अन्य भक्तों के साथ Share करें व Like जरूर करें
http://bit.ly/NovaSpiritualIndia

📱 Listen to Your Favourite Bhakti Songs in Audio & Video, Download the Mobile App
Android: http://bit.ly/BhajanBhaktiApp

Popular Videos
🙏🏻 Durga Chalisa Slow Version - https://youtu.be/sPK-FNYvL_s
🙏🏻 Durga Amritwani - https://youtu.be/ehohsaAIs2c
🙏🏻 Durga Gatha - https://youtu.be/-AoagFfj1ss
🙏🏻 Durga Kavach - https://youtu.be/0rjuR_iiUMg
🙏🏻 Bhor Bhai Din Chad Gaya - https://youtu.be/NtVk69MSdIo
🙏🏻 Jai Ambe Gauri Aarti - https://youtu.be/Kw6J7e8lTDM
🙏🏻 Aigiri Nandini - https://youtu.be/BaAhriclAB0

Credits:
Singer: Anuradha Paudwal
Music Director: Navin-Manish
Lyrics: Traditional
Edit & Gfx : Prem Graphics PG
Music Label: Music Nova

Lyrics:
Namo Namo Durge Sukh Karni
Namo Namo Ambe Dukh Harni
Nirakar Hai Jyoti Tumhari
Tihun Lok Phaili Ujiyari

Shashi Lalaat Mukh Maha Vishala
Netra Lal Bhrikouti Vikarala
Roop Maatu Ko Adhik Suhave
Darsh Karat Jan Ati Sukh Paave
Tum Sansar Shakti Ley Keena
Palan Hetu Anna Dhan Deena
Annapoorna Hui Jag Paala
Tumhi Aadi Sundari Bala

Pralayakal Sab Nashaan Haari
Tum Gouri Shiv Shankar Pyari
Shiv Yogi Tumhare Gun Gaavein
Brahma Vishnu Tumhein Nit Dhyaave
Roop Saraswati Ko Tum Dhara
De Subuddhi Rishi Munina Ubara
Dhara Roop Narsimha Ko Amba
Pragat Bhayi Phaad Kar Khamba

Raksha Kari Prahlad Bachayo
Hiranyaykush Ko Swarg Pathayo
Lakshmi Roop Dharo Jag Mahin
Shree Narayan Anga Samahin

Ksheer Sindhu Mein Karat Vilaasa
Daya Sindhu Deejey Mann Aasa
Hingalaja Mein Tumhi Bhawani
Mahima Amit Na Jaat Bakhani

Matangi Dhoomawati Mata
Bhuvaneshwari Bagala Sukhdata
Shree Bhairav Tara Jag Tarini
Chhinna Bhala Bhava Dukh Nivarini
Kehari Vahan Sohe Bhawani
Laangur Veer Chalat Agavani
Kar Mein Khappar Khadaga Virajay
Jako Dekh Kaal Darr Bhajey

Sohe Astra Aur Trishula
Jate Uthata Shatru Hiya Shoola

Nagkoti Mein Toumhi Virajat
Tihoun Lok Mein Danka Baajat
Shumbh Nishumbh Daanav Tum Maare
Rakta Beej Shankhana Sanghaare
Mahishasur Nrip Ati Abhimani
Jehi Agh Bhar Mahi Akulaani

Roop Karaal Kali Ka Dhara
Sena Sahita Tum Tihin Samhara
 Padi Peed Santan Par Jab Jab
Bhayi Sahay Maat Tum Tab Tab
Amarpuri Auro Sab Lokaa
Tab Mahima Sab Rahey Ashoka
Jwala Mein Hai Jyoti Tumhari
Tumhein Sada Poojey Nar Nari

Prem Bhakti Se Jo Jas Gaave
Dukh Daridra Nikat Nahin Aave
Dhyave Jo Nar Mann Layi
Janma Maran Tako Chhouti Jaayi
Jogi Sur Muni Kahat Pukaari
Yog Nahi Bina Shakti Tumhari
Shankar Acharaj Tap Kinho
Kaamaru Krodh Jeet Sab Leenho

Nishdin Dhyan Dharo Shankar Ko
Kaahu Kaal Nahin Sumiro Tumko
Shakti Roop Ko Maram Na Paayo
Shakti Gayi Tab Mann Pachitayo
Sharnagat Huyi Kiriti Bakhai
Jai Jai Jai Jagadambe Bhawani

Bhayi Prasanna Aadi Jagadamba
Dayi Shakti Nahin Keen Vilamba

Maukon Maatu Kashta Ati Ghero
Tum Bin Kaun Hare Dukh Mero
Asha Trishna Nipat Satave
Ripu Murakh Mohi Ati Darpave
Shatru Nash Keeje Maharani
Sumiron Ikchit Tumhein Bhawani
Karo Kripa Hey Maatu Dayala
Riddhi Siddhi Dey Karahou Nihaala

Jab Lagi Jiyoun Daya Phal Paun
Tumharo Jas Mein Sada Sunaun
Durga Chalisa Jo Koi Gaavey
Sab Sukh Bhog Parampad Paave

Devidas Sharan Neej Jaani
Karahun Krupa Jagadambe Bhawani
Karahun Krupa Jagadambe Bhawani

Sharanagat Raksha Kare
Bhakt Rahe Nishank
Me Aaya Teri Sharan Mein
Matu Leejiye Ank

Join Us
⦿ YouTube: http://bit.ly/NovaSpiritualIndia
⦿ Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/NovaSpiritualIndia
⦿ Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/nova.spiritual.india
⦿ Android App: http://bit.ly/BhajanBhaktiApp
⦿ Website:  https://www.medianova.in

Music Studio Haryanvi Presents Full Video of New Haryanvi Songs Haryanavi 2021. Sawaal सवाल ( Official Video ). Another superhit haryanvi song sung by Amit Saini Rohtakiya. Starring by Amit Saini Rohtakiya, Ravi Panchal , Priya Soni & Shivashdeep Jangid. Music by GR Music. Lyrics are penned by Aamin Barodi. Lyrics :-
Mein tere bina rahluga tu rahlegi ke na,
Mein dard ghane sah lunga tu sahlegi ke na
Mein dard ghane sah lunga tu sahlegi ke na 
Re chalo maan liya gerah ki bahya me jhul jaagi tu
Par khud te to puchh sawaal ke mane bhul jaagi tu 
Par khud te to puchh sawaal ke mane bhul jaagi tu 

Jab hovega ahsas tene kale panka,
Aaj rousu me kaal tubhi rovegi,
Yo pagal sa aave tene yaad itna,
Gulab ki patiya me tohvegi 
Gulab ki patiya me tohvegi

Par khud te to puchh sawaal ke mane bhul jaagi tu

Aamin barodi Jeeve ghut

ke Makha kisite ab kuch kahya jaave na 
ke Makha kisite ab kuch kahya jaave na
Are mere pyaar ka aaj chuka ke mul jaagi tu

जब होवेगा आहस तेने काले पांका,

यो पागल सा अवे तेने यद इतना,
 गुलाब की पतिया मुझसे तोहगी 
गुलाब की पतिया मुझसे तोहगी

snippet.title: First Flight of the Ingenuity Mars Helicopter: Live from Mission Control
snippet.description: Up, up, and away! The Ingenuity #MarsHelicopter is set to make history. It will make the first attempt at powered flight on another planet on Monday, April 19. Don’t miss your chance to watch live with helicopter team in mission control beginning at 6:15 a.m. EDT (10:15 a.m. UTC) as they receive the data and find out if they were successful.

snippet.title: Corona Warrior | Dr.  Satyendra Mishra Airlifted To Hyderabad  | For CoViD Treatment
snippet.description:
కరోనా యోధుడు, ఏడాదిపాటు నిరంతరం కొవిడ్  రోగులకు వైద్య సేవలు అందించి ఎంతోమంది ప్రాణాలు నిలిపిన వైద్యుడు.....సత్యేంద్ర మిశ్రాను హైదరాబాద్  తీసుకొచ్చారు. కొవిడ్ తో తీవ్ర అనారోగ్యం పాలైన 38ఏళ్ల వైద్యుడిని.... భోపాల్  నుంచి ఎయిర్  అంబులెన్స్  ద్వారా ఆయన హైదరాబాద్ కు తరలించారు. 

#LatestNews
#EtvTelangana

snippet.title: കോവിഡ് രണ്ടാം തരംഗത്തിൽ 4 പുതിയതരം രോഗലക്ഷണങ്ങൾ. എല്ലാവരും അറിഞ്ഞിരിക്കേണ്ട പ്രധാനപ്പെട്ട ഇൻഫർമേഷൻ
snippet.description:
കോവിഡിന്റെ ആദ്യതരംഗത്തിൽ കാണാത്ത  ചില പുതിയ ലക്ഷണങ്ങൾ.. 
0:00 Start
3:25 കേരളത്തില്‍ ഗുരുതരം ആകുന്നത് എങ്ങനെ?
5:00 ഒന്നാമത്തെ ലക്ഷണം?
6:03 രണ്ടാമത്തെ-മൂന്നാമത്തെ ലക്ഷണം?
6:50 നലാമത്തെ ലക്ഷണം?
9:00 ബാധിച്ചാല്‍ എന്തു സംഭവിക്കും
10:00 എന്തു മുന്‍ കരുതല്‍ എടുക്കണം?

കോവിഡിന്റെ ഈ രണ്ടാം തരംഗം കേരളത്തിൽ കൂടിയാൽ ഉണ്ടാകുന്ന അപകടങ്ങൾ എന്തെല്ലാം ? ഈ ഇൻഫർമേഷൻ എല്ലാ മലയാളികളുടെയും അറിവിലേക്കായി പരമാവധി ഷെയർ ചെയ്യുക.. കേരളത്തിൽ കോവിഡ് പടരുന്നത് നമ്മുടെ തടയണം

For Appointments  Please Call 90 6161 5959

snippet.title: प्रसाद कैसे बनायें ? जब ये चिंता सताये तो सही माप तोल के साथ ये स्वादिष्ट प्रसाद बनायें |Halwa-Chana
snippet.description:
प्रसाद कैसे बनायें ? जब ये चिंता सताये तो सही माप तोल के साथ ये स्वादिष्ट प्रसाद बनायें |Halwa-Chana

#AshtmiPrasad#HalwaChana#NirmlaNehra

Ingredients:-

For Halwa:-
Semolina-1 cup
Sugar-1 cup
Water-3 cup
Ghee-1/2 cup
Cardamom Powder-1/2 tsp

For Chana:-
Soaked Black Chickpeas-3 cup
Ginger-1 inch
Oil/Ghee-3-4 tbsp
Coriander Powder-2 tsp
Dry Mango Powder-1 tsp
Turmeric Powder-1/4 tsp
Red Chilli Powder-1 tsp
Kasuri Methi-1 tsp
Chana Masala-1 tsp
Black Pepper Powder-1 tsp
Cumin Seeds-1 tsp
Bay Leaf-1
Asafoetida-a pinch 
Salt -to taste
Coriander Leaves

snippet.title: IPL 2021: ఇగ నా వల్ల ఐతలేదురా బయ్, నే బోత | Fans Troll SRH On Twitter | MI v SRH | Oneindia Telugu
snippet.description:
IPL 2021, MI vs SRH Highlights: David Warner's side crashed to their third defeat of the season against the defending champions in Match 9 of the ongoing IPL 2021 season, on Friday.
#IPL2021​
#MIvsSRH​
#MIBeatSRHby13Runs​
#KaviyaMaran​ 
#ManishPandey​
#MemesOnSRH
#TrollsOnSRH
#SunrisersHyderabad​
#SRHLossvsmi​
#ManishPandey​
#MumbaiIndians​
#KaneWilliamson​
#DavidWarner​
#RohitSharma​
#AmbatiRayudu

IPL 2021 సీజన్, 14వ ఎడిషన్‌లో సన్‌రైజర్స్ హైదరాబాద్ ముచ్చటగా మూడోసారి ఓటమి పాలైంది. చేతికి అందేంత ఎత్తులో ఉన్న లక్ష్యాన్ని ఛేదంచలేక చతికిలపడటం ఆ జట్టుకు బాగా అలవాటైనట్టుంది. లక్ష్యానికి చేరువగా వెళ్లి డీలాపడటం వరుసగా ఇది మూడోసారి. 13 పరుగుల తేడాతో మూడో మ్యాచ్‌ను కూడా ప్రత్యర్థికి కోల్పోయింది. ఓపెనర్లు తప్ప ఆ జట్టులో ఇంకెవరూ నాణ్యమైన బ్యాట్స్‌మెన్ లేనట్టు కనిపిస్తోంది. వారిద్దరూ అవుటైతే.. తమ జట్టును ఆ దేవుడు కూడా కాపాడలేడనే విషయాన్ని మరోసారి రుజువు చేసుకుంది

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

snippet.title: TVF's Aspirants | Web Series | Episode 2 | Teacher Sahi Hona Chahiye
snippet.description:
Episode 3 goes live as soon as we reach 8.5M Subscribers

Like the Episode? Rate us on IMDb - https://www.imdb.com/title/tt14392248/

Having a good teacher is extremely important while preparing for UPSC. Abhilash knows it, but he thinks his teacher is not good enough and wants to leave his current coaching center and find a better one. But his current institute doesn’t have a fee-return policy. What will Abhilash do now? Will he continue with his current coaching center, or will he find a better teacher?

One of the biggest and most ambitious dreams - to become an IAS officer! Here’s to the ones who are working hard to crack it. In this journey of rediscovering yourself and giving your best, make Unacademy your companion. Learn and be mentored by Top Educators and move closer to cracking your goal. Take a Free Live Class today!

Enroll Now - https://unacademy.onelink.me/M2BR/e3d9cc8c

This examination season, we bring you the story of three friends who reunite to tell us all about UPSC Pre... Mains... Aur Life. 

Unacademy & The Viral Fever presents ASPIRANTS - A TVF Original Series. 

Credits:
Created by: Arunabh Kumar & Shreyansh Pandey
Directed by: Apoorv Singh Karki 
Written by: Deepesh Sumitra Jagdish 
Produced by: Arunabh Kumar 
Executive Producers: Vijay Koshy, Shreyansh Pandey, Arun Kumar 
Supervising Producers: Haider Ali, Joshna Bhat 
Associate Director: Himali Shah 
D.O.P: Georgy John, Arjun Kukreti 
Editor: Tushar Manocha 
Background Score: Tusshar Mallek 
Head of Post Production: Gaurav Rungta 
Casting: Ashish Khare & Shiv Chauhan 
Production Designer: Beeva Mahajan 
Costume Stylist: Yashika Kakkar 
Sound Design: Pranit Purao (Acoustry Private Limited)
DI Colorist: David Gabris (Futureworks Media Limited)
Head of Finance: Manish Saini

Cast: Naveen Kasturia, Shivankit Parihar, Abhilash Thapliyal, Sunny Hinduja, Namita Dubey

UPSC fact #71: In a village named Bharatpur, Radha, who was married to Heera Thakur, completed her IAS studies after becoming a mother. She left her village to prepare for UPSC, successfully passed the exam, and ended up becoming the collector of her own district. Radha’s father-in-law Thakur Bhanu Pratap, who previously disowned her and his son Heera because they got married against his will, was so impressed by her achievement that he accepted them.
-The Description Guy.

#TVFAspirants #TVFOriginal #LetsCrackIt #UPSC

Episode 3147 :Pooja Calls Popatlal Guruji
---------------------------------------------------------
Pooja Calls Popatlal Guruji and she takes Popatlal as her role model. Pooja thinks Popatlal did not get married because of his profession so she also decides not to get married to know more watch full episode. 

More Useful Links :
 * Visit us at : http://www.sonyliv.com
 * Like us on Facebook : http://www.facebook.com/SonyLIV
 * Follow us on Twitter : http://www.twitter.com/SonyLIV
Also get Sony LIV app on your mobile
 * Google Play - https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.msmpl.livsportsphone
 * ITunes - https://itunes.apple.com/us/app/liv-sports/id879341352?ls=1&mt=8

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises.

snippet.title: Prince Philip's funeral: the key moments
snippet.description:
The funeral of the Duke of Edinburgh has taken place at St George's Chapel in Windsor.

The Queen led her family in mourning her husband of 73 years.

The service was led by the Dean of Windsor, who paid tribute to Prince Philip's "kindness, humour and humanity" - as well as his "unwavering loyalty" to Her Majesty.

Sky's Jason Farrell looks at how the funeral unfolded.

snippet.title: Pinjara Khubsurti Ka | पिंजरा खुबसूरती का | Ep. 171 | Mayura Stands Up To Omkar
snippet.description:
Mayura confronts Omkar after he tries to threaten Vishakha to reveal about Tara and her whereabouts. Later, Mayura lets Omkar talk to Tara on the phone. Will Omkar learn Tara's whereabouts?



#ColorsTV #PinjaraKhubsurtiKa

To subscribe this channel go to: http://www.youtube.com/subscription_center?add_user=colorstv

To download the Voot app please click on the link :
IOS: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/voot/id1011777157
Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tv.v18.viola
Fire TV: https://www.amazon.in/Viacom18-Media-Pvt-Ltd-Originals/dp/B01N2PCGG3/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=voot+tv&qid=1595417708&s=mobile-apps&sr=1-1

To go to the playlist please click: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLcC6hSpO26KtTId4BXRA2uJwxcXaVSIyF

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ColorsTV
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/colorstv/

Mayura is the epitome of beauty, grace and intelligence, but the world only sees her beauty. Trapped in a cage by a society that judges by looks, Mayura yearns for her freedom to fly free. What happens to her fight for individuality when she ends up in a marriage with Omkar, a control freak obsessed with her beauty? Will he ever see his wife beyond her physical form? Will Mayura ever fulfil her own dreams? Or will she remain trapped in her beautiful pinjaraa for life?

snippet.title: पनीर टिक्का मसाला बनाने की विधि - paneer tikka masala restaurant style recipe -cookingshooking
snippet.description:
Dosto Paneer Tikka Masala ki recipe le kar aaya hu, ye tried and tested recipe hai secret ingredient ke saath, bilkul restaurant style me banti hai :)

CookingShooking ko jarur subscribe karein -  https://goo.gl/MH3A4r

Instagram me follow jarur karein - https://www.instagram.com/cooking.shooking

English videos - https://goo.gl/Sxk4Fp

Ingredients:
Paneer Tikka Masala

Tikka ke lie:
Mustard Oil - 2 tbsp
Besan - 2 tbsp
Kashmiri Red Chili Powder - ½ tbsp

Jeera Powder - ½ tsp
Garam Masala - ½ tsp
Kali Mirch - ½ tsp
Chat Masala - 1 tsp
Salt - to taste
Kasoori Methi - ½ tsp
GG Paste - 1 tsp
Dahi - 4 tbsp

Lemon - 1, juiced
Shimla Mirch - 7-8 pieces ( green & yellow)
Pyaaz - 1 shelled
Paneer - 200g

Water - to adjust consistency
Charcoal - 1 
Oil - ½ tsp

For Gravy 
Oil - 2 tbsp
Pyaaz - 1 cup chopped
Salt - to taste
GG Paste - 1 tsp
Tomato - 1 cup chopped

Oil - 2 tbsp
Kali Elaichi - 3 
Kali Mirch - ½ tsp
Dhania Powder - 1 tsp
Red Chilli Powder - ½ tsp (can add color if not using kashmiri chili)
Hari Mirch - 3 slit
Hara Dhania Leaves - 2-3 tbsp
Leftover Marinate of the Tikka
Corn Starch - 1 tsp (dissolve with 2 tbsp water)
Sugar - ½ tsp
Cream - 2 tbsp


Kitchen Products
Measuring Cup & Spoon Set - https://amzn.to/2KZBVpq
Chopper for Fine Cutting - https://amzn.to/2UCCo7X
Mixer Grinder - https://amzn.to/2XTI1jW 
Power Blender for Smoothie, Shakes - https://amzn.to/37ozHM6
Hand Blender+Mixer+Chopper - https://amzn.to/2MOHjhL
Gas Sandwich Griller - https://amzn.to/37mvfgW
Good NonStick Pan - https://amzn.to/2zl0hsa (steel spoon safe)
Kitchen Weight Scale - https://amzn.to/2ug3G65 
Instant Yeast - https://amzn.to/2N2wzuf (keep in freezer)
Instant Yeast - https://amzn.to/2KZSkdn (small pack)
Pizza Screen - https://amzn.to/2m4zpn6 (3 pack - 6,7,8 inches)
Parchment Paper - much better than butter paper, and it is reusable - https://amzn.to/2MZFGvC
Whipping Cream - https://amzn.to/2ugPB8m

paneer tikka masala recipe in hindi

localized.title: पनीर टिक्का मसाला बनाने की विधि - paneer tikka masala restaurant style recipe -cookingshooking
localized.description:
Dosto Paneer Tikka Masala ki recipe le kar aaya hu, ye tried and tested recipe hai secret ingredient ke saath, bilkul restaurant style me banti hai :)

CookingShooking ko jarur subscribe karein -  https://goo.gl/MH3A4r

Instagram me follow jarur karein - https://www.instagram.com/cooking.shooking

English videos - https://goo.gl/Sxk4Fp

Ingredients:
Paneer Tikka Masala

Tikka ke lie:
Mustard Oil - 2 tbsp
Besan - 2 tbsp
Kashmiri Red Chili Powder - ½ tbsp

Jeera Powder - ½ tsp
Garam Masala - ½ tsp
Kali Mirch - ½ tsp
Chat Masala - 1 tsp
Salt - to taste
Kasoori Methi - ½ tsp
GG Paste - 1 tsp
Dahi - 4 tbsp

Lemon - 1, juiced
Shimla Mirch - 7-8 pieces ( green & yellow)
Pyaaz - 1 shelled
Paneer - 200g

Water - to adjust consistency
Charcoal - 1 
Oil - ½ tsp

For Gravy 
Oil - 2 tbsp
Pyaaz - 1 cup chopped
Salt - to taste
GG Paste - 1 tsp
Tomato - 1 cup chopped

Oil - 2 tbsp
Kali Elaichi - 3 
Kali Mirch - ½ tsp
Dhania Powder - 1 tsp
Red Chilli Powder - ½ tsp (can add color if not using kashmiri chili)
Hari Mirch - 3 slit
Hara Dhania Leaves - 2-3 tbsp
Leftover Marinate of the Tikka
Corn Starch - 1 tsp (dissolve with 2 tbsp water)
Sugar - ½ tsp
Cream - 2 tbsp


Kitchen Products
Measuring Cup & Spoon Set - https://amzn.to/2KZBVpq
Chopper for Fine Cutting - https://amzn.to/2UCCo7X
Mixer Grinder - https://amzn.to/2XTI1jW 
Power Blender for Smoothie, Shakes - https://amzn.to/37ozHM6
Hand Blender+Mixer+Chopper - https://amzn.to/2MOHjhL
Gas Sandwich Griller - https://amzn.to/37mvfgW
Good NonStick Pan - https://amzn.to/2zl0hsa (steel spoon safe)
Kitchen Weight Scale - https://amzn.to/2ug3G65 
Instant Yeast - https://amzn.to/2N2wzuf (keep in freezer)
Instant Yeast - https://amzn.to/2KZSkdn (small pack)
Pizza Screen - https://amzn.to/2m4zpn6 (3 pack - 6,7,8 inches)
Parchment Paper - much better than butter paper, and it is reusable - https://amzn.to/2MZFGvC
Whipping Cream - https://amzn.to/2ugPB8m
Oven For Baking - https://amzn.to/2udP3A5 (28liter Good for 3-4 people)

snippet.title: Swaragini | स्वरागिनी | Episode 203
snippet.description:
Swara questions Uttara. Sujata and Annapurna discuss about Uttara. Uttara explains to Lakshya as to why she helped him and he apologises for her having to take all the blame.

#ColorsRishtey #Swaragini

To subscribe this channel go to: https://www.youtube.com/c/ColorsRishtey1/featured

To download the Voot app please click on the link :
IOS: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/voot/id1011777157
Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tv.v18.viola
Fire TV: https://www.amazon.in/Viacom18-Media-Pvt-Ltd-Originals/dp/B01N2PCGG3/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=voot+tv&qid=1595417708&s=mobile-apps&sr=1-1

To go to the show playlist please click: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLX18mvVSh-bwL5H8eIQ6w51VWKyjzA0oU

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/colorsrishteyindia
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/rishteytv/

'Swaragini' is a story about Swara and Ragini, who belong to warring families, but later realise that they are in fact half-sisters. Out of sheer hatred, Ragini manipulates Swara's love interest, Lakshaya into marriage, while Swara ends up getting married to Lakshya's brother, Sanskar. Once he learns the truth, Sanskar swears to reunite Swara with Lakshya, but in turn falls in love with her. Will Swara choose her lover over her husband, or will the sanctity of holy matrimony triumph?

snippet.title: Gun Warga - Harvy Sandhu (Official Video) | Gurlez Akhtar | Desi Crew | New Punjabi Song 2021
snippet.description:
New Punjabi Song 2021 - Gun Warga
Listen to on all audio streaming platforms: https://harvysandhu.bfan.link/gun-warga.yde

The quintessential Punjabi machismo shines in Harvy Sandhu's latest track  'Gun Warga'. Featuring music by the famous Desi Crew and featuring vocals by the amazing Gurlez Akhtar, the track will surely make you jump with energy. 

Track credits:
Song: Gun Warga
Singer: Harvy Sandhu
Music: Desi Crew
Lyrics: Jeet Kamal Kuhliwala
Video: Tru Team
Mix & Master: Sameer Charegoankar
Female Lead: Isha Sharma
Dop: Shoeb Siddiqui
Edit & DI: Garry Khatrao Media
Publicity Design: Roop Kamal Singh
Photography: Harnam Singh
Special Thanks: Sanjeev Sharma
Hair - Ravi
Choreographer - Sumit Kumar
Assistant Choreographer - Robin Singh
Team Believe: Shilpa Sharda & Akshay Kapoor

Reels Promotion - Blue Apple Digital
Online Promotions - GK Digital

Follow me on:
Facebook: https://bit.ly/HarvyOnFacebook
Instagram: https://bit.ly/HarvyOnInstagram
Twitter: https://bit.ly/HarvyOnTwitter
Snapchat: https://bit.ly/HarvyOnSnapchat

Don't forget to subscribe to my YouTube Channel:
https://bit.ly/HarvyOnYouTube

For Licensing enquiries: 
Email: sync-india@believedigital.com

#HarvySandhu #GurlezAkhtar #GunWarga

For Licensing enquiries: 
Email:- sync-india@believedigital.com

For booking enquiries:
artistbooking-india@believedigital.com


Lyrics :- 
Jione mod jiha rakhda si roab jo
vairiyan de mna vich ni
jet sky kehnda taarni aa hun kude
pyar wali jhana vich ni
heera raani de taaj vich jadya 
ni kehnda tere tann warga
munda sinn ke akhan naa kudde suttgi
ni webley di gun warga

peen jatti diya sonha utte chobar 
ve gla vicho zaan sukkiyan 
suit hunde ne import ve lahore ton
te saudi walon aun juttiyan
jinne listan ch aunde ne greek god
lainde ne dream saak de
fail jatti de husan agge sohniya 
iran diyan hooran aakhde

teri gallan diyan gallan rahe karda
jado khull jande datt ni
jehra khara vi na paave laal pari ch
oh laaliyan ne liya patt ni
kehnda nattiyan pva lu oh ch tere layi
si baapu jehra kann fadd da....
munda sinn ke akhan naa kudde suttgi
ni webley di gun warga

kala mole ve jatti di gori gall te
nazran ton raakhi karda
kaale rang da paranda bacha naag da
ve zehar wangu jaave charhda
jeet kuhliwale utte ho gaye parche
nitt hunde ne khadaak ve.....
fail jatti de husan agge sohniya 
iran diyan hooran aakhde

saah lain vi ni dinda ea bullet nu 
ni gedi utte gedi rakhda
kitte chakkya na jaave putt jatt da
ni billo tera time chakkda
teri takkni kaleja billo thaar ta
jo tappda si sun warga,
munda sinn ke akhan naa kudde suttgi
ni webley di gun warga

snippet.title: കോവിഡ് നിയന്ത്രണങ്ങള്‍ കാറ്റില്‍ പറത്തി മെഡിക്കല്‍ വിദ്യാര്‍ഥികളുടെ വിജയാഘോഷം | Mathrubhumi News
snippet.description:
കോവിഡ് വ്യാപനം കുതിച്ചുയരുന്നതിനിടെ കോവിഡ് നിയന്ത്രണങ്ങള്‍ കാറ്റില്‍ പറത്തി കോട്ടയം മെഡിക്കല്‍ കോളേജില്‍ വിദ്യാര്‍ഥികളുടെ ആഘോഷപ്രകടനം.

Watch Mathrubhumi News Live at https://youtu.be/DhujH-qBWx0

Mathrubhumi News is now available on WhatsApp. Click https://mbi.page.link/MBNewsWAS to subscribe.

#MalayalamNews #MalayalamLatestNews #KeralaNews #MathrubhumiNews #Mathrubhumi #Malayalamnewslive #Malayalamlivenews #Latestmalayalamnews  #Breakingnews #Breakingnewskerala #Breakingnewslive

Connect with Mathrubhumi News:
Visit Mathrubhumi News's Website: http://www.mathrubhumi.com/tv/
Find Mathrubhumi News on Facebook: https://www.fb.com/mbnewsin/
-----------------------------------------------------
Mathrubhumi News (മലയാളം: മാതൃഭൂമി ന്യൂസ്) is a 24-hour Malayalam television news channel and is one of Kerala's most viewed TV channels. Owing to its varied presentation style and reliable content, Mathrubhumi News has become the fastest-growing news channel in Kerala. More than just a news channel, Mathrubhumi News features a host of programs that relate to various aspects of life in Kerala. Some of the frontline shows of the channel are: 
- Wake Up Kerala, the Best Morning Show in Malayalam television.
- Njangalkum Parayanund, youth-centric viewers sourced discussion around the pressing topic of the day.
- Super Prime Time, the most discussed debate show during prime time in Kerala.
- Vakradrishti and Dhim Tharikida Thom, unmatchable satire shows.
- She Matters, the woman-centric daily show.
- Spark@3, the show on issues that light up the day.
- World Wide, a weekly round-up of all the important news from around the globe.

Happy viewing!

Mathrubhumi News is an initiative by The Mathrubhumi Printing & Publishing Co. Ltd.
Mathrubhumi News. All rights reserved ©.

snippet.title: Gokuldham में लड़ाई का माहौल | Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah | Mini Episodes | Webisodes
snippet.description:
Click here to Subscribe to SAB TV Channel: https://www.youtube.com/user/sabtv?sub_confirmation=1

Click to watch all the mini-episodes of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah 
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL6Rtnh6YJK7YXlq18P_6laPNbm0MuqEuG

About The Show:
----------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalaal.

snippet.title: Fast & Furious 9 – Official Hindi Trailer 2 (Universal Pictures) HD
snippet.description:
In cinemas soon!

Follow us on Facebook at https://www.facebook.com/UniversalPicturesIndia/ 
Find us on Instagram at https://www.instagram.com/universalpicturesindia/
Follow us on Twitter at https://twitter.com/UniversalIND 


Genre: Action Thriller Cast: Vin Diesel, Michelle Rodriguez, Tyrese Gibson, Chris “Ludacris” Bridges, John Cena, Jordana Brewster, Nathalie Emmanuel, with Helen Mirren and Charlize Theron Director: Justin Lin Written by: Dan Casey Based on Characters Created by: Gary Scott Thompson Producers: Neal H. Moritz, Vin Diesel, Jeff Kirschenbaum, Joe Roth, Justin Lin, Clayton Townsend, Samantha Vincent

No matter how fast you are, no one outruns their past.

F9 is the ninth chapter in the Fast & Furious Saga, which has endured for two decades and has earned more than $5 billion around the world.

Vin Diesel’s Dom Toretto is leading a quiet life off the grid with Letty and his son, little Brian, but they know that danger always lurks just over their peaceful horizon. This time, that threat will force Dom to confront the sins of his past if he’s going to save those he loves most. His crew joins together to stop a world-shattering plot led by the most skilled assassin and high-performance driver they’ve ever encountered: a man who also happens to be Dom’s forsaken brother, Jakob (John Cena, the upcoming The Suicide Squad).

F9 sees the return of Justin Lin as director, who helmed the third, fourth, fifth and sixth chapters of the series when it transformed into a global blockbuster. The action hurtles around the globe—from London to Tokyo, from Central America to Edinburgh, and from a secret bunker in Azerbaijan to the teeming streets of Tbilisi. Along the way, old friends will be resurrected, old foes will return, history will be rewritten, and the true meaning of family will be tested like never before.

The film stars returning cast members Michelle Rodriguez, Tyrese Gibson, Chris “Ludacris” Bridges, Jordana Brewster, Nathalie Emmanuel and Sung Kang, with Oscar® winner Helen Mirren and Oscar® winner Charlize Theron. F9 also features Grammy-winning superstar Cardi B as new franchise character Leysa, a woman with a connection to Dom’s past, and a cameo by Reggaeton sensation Ozuna.

F9 is produced by Neal H. Moritz, Vin Diesel, Jeff Kirschenbaum, Joe Roth, Justin Lin, Clayton Townsend and Samantha Vincent.

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ColorsTV
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/colorstv/

Set against the backdrop of culturally rich and vibrant Punjab, Shakti-Astitva Ke Ehsaas Ki portrays the power of a family to dictate the fate of its daughters, Soumya and Surbhi. Deprived of an education, companions and toys, Soumya can't understand the indifference her father and Dadi show towards her and finds solace only in her mother's arms. Meanwhile Surbhi gets everything she wants, except for the one thing she yearns for-her mother's love. What has caused these heart-breaking rifts in this otherwise perfect family? What makes parents discriminate between their own daughters? Watch the mystery unfold.

snippet.description:
Welcome to Aditya Movies

Follow and Enjoy the Latest Hindi Dubbed Movie " A AA " Part 3 Starring Nithiin, Samantha and Anupama Parameshwaran. Directed by Trivikram.

#AAa #Nithiin #Samantha #AnupamaParameshwaran #AAAPart3 #AdityaMovies

Film Name: A AA
Director: Trivikram
Producer: Umesh Gupta
Actor: Nithiin
Actress: Samantha, Anupama Parameshwaran
Banner: Aditya Music India Pvt.Ltd.

A Aa Movie Synopsis:

Anasuya (Samantha) is a docile young woman who wants to break free from the clutches of her control-freak mom (Nadiya). While her mom is gone on a business trip, Anasuya sneaks up to the village of her maternal uncle. Vihari (Nithin) is Anasuya’s brother-in-law and he hosts her. Vihari’s wedding is already fixed with another girl. Anasuya’s mom gets her a wedding alliance. Rest of the story is all about the issue between these two families and how Anansuya Ramalingam and Anand Vihari unite at the end.

Sathiyam also offers news based investigative shows such as Urakka Solvoem, Kuttram Kuttramae, discussion shows such as Sathiyam Saathiyamae, Kelvi Kanaigal & Adaiyaalam, public interest shows such as Pasumarathaani, Ivar Yaar, Uzhavan & Urimai Kural, satirical shows such as Mic Mayaandi and history based shows such as Varalaattril Indru & Varalaaru Pesukirathu.
We as a company have passion to reach out to the Tamil speaking population world over with the honest and responsible presentation of news and current affairs that reflects the true spirit of journalism and reported with authenticity, clarity and definitive conviction. All the broadcasts of Sathiyam Television will express news in a manner that is true, integral, understandable and devoid of sensationalism or slander of any kind. All broadcasts of Sathiyam Television have a singular focus of arming the viewer with the truth that would empower them to make a decision by themselves. This change we believe in turn will prepare our Nation to face the reality of truth and motivate its citizens to operate based on their individual decision.

Sathiyam is aiming to become a strong and competitive channel in the GEC space of Tamil Television scenario. Sathiyam’s biggest strength is its people. The channel has some of the best talent on its rolls. A clear vision backed by the best brains gives Sathiyam a clear cut edge in the crowded Tamil TV landscape.

As for DTH, Sathiyam is available in all leading DTH & other OTT  platforms  Sathiyam TV is also available for viewership in the Bangalore, Mysore, Hubli & Dharwad areas of Karnataka and in Mumbai & Kolkata through terrestrial means, apart from a 24X7 web streaming at www.sathiyam.tv

Sathiyam has also ventured into offering media based vocational education and training through its educational arm, Sathiyam Academy. Apart from these, Sathiyam runs a matrimonial service by the name MY BEST COMPANION.

hi.description:
Rajasthan Weekend Curfew :  प्रदेश के तमाम शहरों में सन्नाटा पसरा | Covid 19 News | Rajasthan Police

प्रदेश में पहले वीकेंड लॉकडाउन का आज दूसरा दिन है, प्रदेश के तमाम शहरों में सन्नाटा पसरा हुआ है, पुलिस की टीमें शहरों-कस्बों में गश्त कर कर्फ्यू नियमों की पालना करा रही हैं, उपचुनाव वाले इलाकों में लॉकडाउन प्रभावी नहीं है, बाकी सभी जगहों पर बाजार बंद पड़े हैं

#RajasthanWeekendCurfew #Covid19News #RajasthanPolice

About Channel
Zee Rajasthan News believes that villages make the State। The channel will cover content from various villages/Tehsil/District beyond the Rajasthan  capital or cities। ZEE Rajasthan News will flash more than 1500 news throughout the day।

Please visit our ZeeRajasthan.com for latest opinions and detailed news coverage.

snippet.title: Mi 11 Ultra Unboxing : THIS IS REAL NUMBER KING!
snippet.description:
Mi 11 Ultra Unboxing : THIS IS REAL NUMBER KING!

Hey #TechBarArmy​​
This is Mi 11 Ultra & Xiaomi 80W wireless charger Unboxing in Hindi. In this Mi 11 Ultra Unboxing you will find ,Mi 11 Ultra design explained, Mi 11 Ultra battery, Mi 11 Ultra specifications, and my first impressions..

Mi 11 Ultra Specification
6.81-inch Quad HD+ AMOLED display with 120Hz refresh rate, 1700 nits (peak)brightness,Dolby Vision, Corning Gorilla Glass Victus protection
1.1-inch (126 x 294) AMOLED rear touch always-on display 
Snapdragon 888 5G
8GB LPPDDR5 with 128GB UFS 3.1 storage
50MP rear camera with 1/ 1.12″ Samsung ISOCELL GN2 sensor,48MP 128° ultra-wide Sony IMX586 sensor, 48MP telephoto camera with Sony IMX586 sensor
20MP front camera
In-screen fingerprint sensor
Dual speakers, SOUND BY Harman Kardon
IP68
5000mAh with 67W wired QC4+ / QC3+ / PD3.0, 67W wireless fast charging,
10w wireless reverse charging

#TechBar #Xiaomi #Redmi #Mi11Ultra #India #Unboxing
